creator: Andre.Albsmeier@mchp.siemens.de
text:
In FreeBSD 4.2-STABLE savecore now complains:

warning: /var/run/dev.db: No such file or directory

Fix: 

Hmm, /etc/rc runs savecore before dev_mkdb so the error message
makes sense. Maybe dev_mkdb should just be moved up ?
How-To-Repeat: 
Boot a recent FreeBSD 4.2-STABLE machine.
